Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "STUNTBIKE-C500-0819" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c500 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Stunt Bike.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $C500 which:
1. Copies 512 bytes of data from $C530 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400 2. Sets up the correct VICII settings 3. Jumps to the entry point at $0819 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
The loading screen is based on the Spectrum version
